SIDE NOTES

I finally made one of Amanda O’Neill from Little Witch Academia! This show brings me so much comfort and it’s genuinely one of my favorites! I made this off of inspiration from the song “Little Miss Perfect” by Write Out Loud and sang by Taylor Louderman. I honestly don’t know what song best fits Zia Rashid, so if you have any suggestions, PLEASE share! I hope you enjoy this bot, and have a wonderful day, You Lovely Human Beings! <3
